quotes.text: Adding manpower to a late software project makes it later.
quotes.author: Fred Brooks

quotes.text: We tried agile. We tried scrum. We tried kanban. We tried SAFe. Turns out the problem was never the methodology.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Every time management introduces a new 'productivity tool,' productivity drops by 30% while everyone learns it, then returns to baseline.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best way to manage stress is to eliminate the source. If you can't eliminate it, change your relationship with it.
quotes.author: based
